monitor_the_situation.title: Israeli Bombing Cuts Power to Multiple Hospitals in Gaza
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 43m ago. Israeli strikes cut power to hospitals across Gaza, deepening the humanitarian crisis.

— S3 · Conflict · Deir al-Balah, Gaza Strip · 1h ago. One person killed and several wounded in an Israeli airstrike in central Gaza.
